data.description: Rethink your future mindset, as studies show only 10% of our thoughts are focused on the present moment.

data.title: Chinese brand ASTRAUX to unveil new ASTRAUX Micro Smart EV AL series, priced at €5,990, at IFA 2025 in Berlin.
data.description: The Chinese innovation company, ASTRAUX, will be holding its Global Launch Event on September 4, 2025, in Berlin. The event will showcase three innovative products at IFA 2025, including the ASTRAUX Micro Smart EV AL series. This new micro electric vehicle is part of ASTRAUX's groundbreaking lineup and aims to meet the increasing demand for eco-friendly transportation. The event is expected to draw significant attention, with attendees eager to learn more about ASTRAUX's latest offerings.

data.title: Esports World Cup Foundation announces Esports Nations Cup, a global team competition with Electronic Arts, Krafton, Tencent, Ubisoft for November 2026 event in Saudi Arabia.
data.description: The Esports World Cup Foundation (EWCF) recently revealed plans for the first-ever global, recurring national team competition in esports, set to take place in November 2026. This groundbreaking event will feature major game developers Electronic Arts, Krafton, Tencent, and Ubisoft. The competition is set to be held in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, as announced in a media kit released on August 23, 2025. This initiative signifies a significant step forward in the world of esports, with expectations for massive global participation and viewership.

data.title: Polyvinyl Butyral market expected to reach $1.9 billion by 2030 per MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the Polyvinyl Butyral market was published on August 23, 2025. The market analysis focuses on various applications, including Films & Sheets, Paints & Coatings, Adhesives, and other applications. The thickness categories evaluated are Ultra-thin Films, Standard Films, Mid-range Films, and Thick & Composite Interlayers and above. The study also delves into different resin types used in the market. This comprehensive report provides insights into the industry's trends, challenges, and opportunities for growth.

data.title: IDEX Biometrics disclosed a private placement of 9,090,909 shares at NOK 3.30 per share on July 21, 2025.
data.description: IDEX Biometrics ASA recently announced a private placement on 21 July 2025 consisting of 9,090,909 shares priced at NOK 3.30 per share, divided into two tranches. The company has also shared information on primary insiders.

data.title: Chainlink aiming for $28.50 target with $26.48 resistance. Bulls eye rally if $23.50 support holds.
data.description: According to recent price predictions, LINK is expected to potentially rally to $28.50 in the next two weeks as the cryptocurrency breaks through important technical thresholds. Despite this positive outlook, it is emphasized that maintaining support at $23.50 is crucial for buyers.

data.title: South Korean man arrested for allegedly laundering $50M in crypto to gold with call center gang in Thailand.
data.description: Authorities in Thailand have apprehended a male individual from South Korea who stands accused of aiding a criminal call center group in laundering more than $50 million in cryptocurrency by converting it into gold.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $32 breakout after 13% rally, with $25.99 resistance as key level. Bullish indicators signal August surge.
data.description: A prediction for AVAX's price points towards a possible target of $32, backed by technical indicators turning bullish after a significant 13.18% surge in a day. The key resistance level at $25.99 is seen as crucial for a breakout scenario.

data.title: Polkadot (DOT) expected to reach $13.50-19.45 by Q4 2025 with technical recovery. Bullish forecast predicts $19.45 by 2025 end.
data.description: The price prediction for DOT indicates a bullish trend aiming for a medium-term target of $13.50, with forecasts for Polkadot suggesting a potential increase to $19.45 by the end of 2025.

data.title: Industrial Steam Generation Outlook expected to reach 12,780.0 billion kg by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 4.5%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of August 23, 2025, reports suggest that the worldwide forecast for Industrial Steam Generation is on an upward trajectory. Anticipated to increase from approximately 9,856.7 billion kg in 2024 to 12,780.0 billion kg by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.5%. This projection signifies a significant expansion in steam generation within industrial sectors, pointing towards continued growth and development throughout the forecast period.

data.title: Kaolin market to reach $8.27 billion by 2030 - MarketsandMarkets™ report. Various types & end-use industries covered.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 23, 2025, a study was released on the Kaolin Market. The research categorized Kaolin into two types - Synthetic and Natural - and looked at various processes involved such as Water-washed, Airfloat, Calcined, Delaminated, Surface-modified, and Unprocessed. This market analysis also explored the End-use Industries of Kaolin including Paper, Ceramics & Sanitaryware, Fiberglass, Paints & Coatings, and Rubber. The report did not disclose specific data but it underscores the significance of Kaolin across industries.

data.title: Bitcoin's price could reach $124,500 with key support at $112,000 holding through September, technical analysis shows.
data.description: The current Bitcoin price prediction indicates a near-term target of $124,500 if the cryptocurrency can uphold its support level at $112,000. Technical analysis suggests a potential breakout window within the next 7 to 14 days.
